name: apam-plugin
description: APAM means Aseprite + Pixel + MCP: a general Codex plugin for professional asset workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create professional pixel assets with Aseprite, MCP, and Codex.
interface.longDescription: APAM means Aseprite + Pixel + MCP. APAM Plugin adds general Codex workflows for professional pixel-art and game/UI assets: one-prompt-per-asset generation, Aseprite batch export, sprite sheets, metadata, palette/indexed conversion, normalization, manifest updates, and local MCP tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me create professional pixel assets with Aseprite.
